title: How it works — Mioca autonomous business OS (coming soon)
description: How Mioca runs unattended: read the market, propose a move, build, get approval where it matters, ship, measure, and rewrite itself — the same loop, over and over.
ogTitle: How Mioca works — the loop that runs unattended
heading: How it keeps running, unattended
lead: Mioca runs the same loop: read the market, propose a move, build, get approval where it matters, ship, measure, and rewrite itself.

steps.title: Read the market and the response
steps.body: Observe what's wanted and which moves worked.

steps.title: Propose the next move
steps.body: Form a hypothesis from what it observed and decide what to do next. It doesn't wait to be told.

steps.title: Generate the deliverable
steps.body: Write the articles, landing pages, and posts. If quality falls short of the bar, it redoes them.

steps.title: Wait for approval where it matters
steps.body: High-risk actions — publishing, shipping, charging — proceed only after a human approves.

steps.title: Ship what's approved
steps.body: Distribute to each channel in a form whose reach can be measured.

steps.title: Measure and record
steps.body: Count reach, clicks, outcomes. Log when, what, and why.

steps.title: Rewrite the strategy
steps.body: Fold in what worked and what didn't, and update the strategy itself. Not learning — revision.

blocks.label: PROOF
blocks.heading: You can check the work, after the fact
points: Decisions and shipments are logged — when, what, and why
Deliverables are signed, so tampering is detectable
Deterministic steps return the same output for the same input
Numbers written by the LLM are never shown (tallies come from the ledger)
blocks.note: * Coming soon. After launch, this measurement is replaced by real data from the internal ledger.

ctaBody: We'll tell you first when it opens. Indicative pricing goes to the waitlist first, too.
